meta_title: For Freelancers: client workflow to Solve stuck with basic apps (Intermediate Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to client workflow and overcome stuck with basic apps. A Intermediate-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: stuck with basic apps

content.seo_title: Freelancer Workflow: Scale Past Basic Apps with AI Tools
content.seo_description: Break through the 'basic app' plateau. Master a high-velocity client workflow using Antigravity and Claude Code to ship professional-grade SaaS faster.
content.answer_block: Stop building static wrappers. By integrating Antigravity for architectural scaffolding and Claude Code for iterative logic, you shift from manual coding to orchestration. This workflow allows you to generate robust, production-ready modules in minutes, enabling you to deliver complex client features while maintaining total control over the codebase.
content.intro:
The 'Basic App Trap' is a silent career killer. You start a project with high ambitions, only to find yourself buried in boilerplate, debugging trivial state issues, and missing deadlines because your workflow isn't built for scale. Your clients aren't paying for code; they are paying for the lightning-fast delivery of business value.

It is time to transcend the amateur build process. By leveraging Antigravity and Claude Code, you transform from a solitary coder into an AI-augmented architect. This isn't just about speed—it is about shipping high-integrity, modular systems that make you the most dangerous developer in the room.

steps.title: Architectural Scaffolding
steps.description: Define your schema and core business logic before writing a single line of code. This ensures the foundation supports future scaling.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a modular project architecture for a high-performance SaaS using Next.js and Supabase. Include directory structure for services, hooks, and types.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'initialize project structure based on provided schema'

steps.title: Data Schema Normalization
steps.description: Use AI to enforce strict typing across your database and frontend to prevent runtime errors.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Convert this business requirement document into a normalized Prisma schema with relational integrity.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'apply schema changes and generate types'

steps.title: Rapid Logic Iteration
steps.description: Implement complex features by breaking them into atomic, testable functions managed by Claude Code.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a robust server-side action to handle user authentication and profile synchronization with error handling.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'implement authentication logic in src/lib/auth.ts'

steps.title: Automated Testing Suite
steps.description: Never ship without validation. Automate unit tests for your core business logic to ensure client requirements are met.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate Vitest unit tests for the core service layer, covering edge cases and successful path execution.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate and execute tests for the authentication module'

steps.title: Deployment Orchestration
steps.description: Automate your CI/CD pipeline so every push is production-ready and documented.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow for automated deployment to Vercel with linting and test verification.

pro_tips: Always maintain a 'Context-Markdown' file in your repo; Claude Code uses this to understand your evolving design system.
Use Antigravity to generate documentation comments for every function; it prevents technical debt during client handoffs.
Force Claude Code to verify dependencies before every build to catch version conflicts early.
Treat your AI prompts as versioned assets; keep a library of 'Golden Prompts' for common client features.
Use the 'diff' mode in Claude Code to review every AI suggestion rather than blindly accepting code blocks.
content.next_steps: Begin by applying this workflow to your next small client project to validate the speed increase, then migrate your existing boilerplate to this modular architecture.
content.conversion_block: Stop settling for basic. Elevate your freelance career by mastering the tools that turn hours of work into minutes of orchestration. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
